has ai.name: Has AI
has ai.description: Checks whether an entity has AI.

allay can duplicate.name: Allay Can Duplicate
allay can duplicate.description: Checks to see if an allay is able to duplicate naturally.

do respawn anchors work.name: Do Respawn Anchors Work
do respawn anchors work.description: Checks whether or not respawn anchors work in a world.

event cancelled.name: Event Cancelled
event cancelled.description: Checks whether or not the event is cancelled.

can fly.name: Can Fly
can fly.description: Whether a player is allowed to fly.

can hold.name: Can Hold
can hold.description: Tests whether a player or a chest can hold the given item.

can pick up items.name: Can Pick Up Items
can pick up items.description: Whether living entities are able to pick up items off the ground or not.

can see.name: Can See
can see.description: Checks whether the given players can see the provided entities.

can see chat colors.name: Can See Chat Colors
can see chat colors.description: Checks whether a player can see chat colors.

has chat filtering.name: Has Chat Filtering
has chat filtering.description: Checks whether a player has chat filtering enabled.

can see messages.name: Can See Messages
can see messages.description: Checks whether a player can see specific message types in chat.

damage cause.name: Damage Cause
damage cause.description: The damage cause of a damage event. Please click on the link for more information.

will consume boosting firework.name: Will Consume Boosting Firework
will consume boosting firework.description: Checks to see if the firework used in an 'elytra boost' event will be consumed.

entity is in liquid.name: Entity is in Liquid
entity is in liquid.description: Checks whether an entity is in rain, lava, water or a bubble column.

entity is wet.name: Entity is Wet
entity is wet.description: Checks whether an entity is wet or not (in water, rain or a bubble column).

entity storage is full.name: Entity Storage Is Full
entity storage is full.description: Checks to see if the an entity block storage (i.e beehive) is full.

is from a mob spawner.name: Is From A Mob Spawner
is from a mob spawner.description: Checks if an entity was spawned from a mob spawner.

has glowing text.name: Has Glowing Text
has glowing text.description: Checks whether a sign (either a block or an item) has glowing text

goat has horns.name: Goat Has Horns
goat has horns.description: Checks to see if a goat has or does not have a left, right, or both horns.

has client weather.name: Has Client Weather
has client weather.description: Checks whether the given players have a custom client weather

has custom model data.name: Has Custom Model Data
has custom model data.description: Check if an item has a custom model data tag

has line of sight.name: Has Line of Sight
has line of sight.description: Checks whether living entities have an unobstructed line of sight to other entities or locations.

has metadata.name: Has Metadata
has metadata.description: Checks whether a metadata holder has a metadata tag.

has scoreboard tag.name: Has Scoreboard Tag
has scoreboard tag.description: Checks whether the given entities has the given scoreboard tags.

ignition process.name: Ignition Process
ignition process.description: Checks if a creeper is going to explode.

is incendiary.name: Is Incendiary
is incendiary.description: Checks if an entity will create fire when it explodes. This condition is also usable in an explosion prime event.

is alive.name: Is Alive
is alive.description: Checks whether an entity is alive. Works for non-living entities too.

is banned.name: Is Banned
is banned.description: Checks whether a player or IP is banned.

is block.name: Is Block
is block.description: Checks whether an item is a block.

is blocking.name: Is Blocking
is blocking.description: Checks whether a player is blocking with their shield.

is block redstone powered.name: Is Block Redstone Powered
is block redstone powered.description: Checks if a block is indirectly or directly powered by redstone

is burning.name: Is Burning
is burning.description: Checks whether an entity is on fire, e.g. a zombie due to being in sunlight, or any entity after falling into lava.

is charged.name: Is Charged
is charged.description: Checks if a creeper, wither, or wither skull is charged (powered).

is charging fireball.name: Is Charging Fireball
is charging fireball.description: Check whether a ghast is charging a fireball.

is climbing.name: Is Climbing
is climbing.description: Whether a living entity is climbing, such as a spider up a wall or a player on a ladder.

is conditional.name: Is Conditional
is conditional.description: Checks whether a command block is conditional or not.

is custom name visible.name: Is Custom Name Visible
is custom name visible.description: Checks if an entity's custom name is visible.

is dancing.name: Is Dancing
is dancing.description: Checks to see if an entity is dancing, such as allays, parrots, or piglins.

camel is dashing.name: Camel Is Dashing
camel is dashing.description: Checks whether a camel is currently using its dash ability.

is eating.name: Is Eating
is eating.description: Whether a panda or horse type (horse, camel, donkey, llama, mule) is eating.

is edible.name: Is Edible
is edible.description: Checks whether an item is edible.

is empty.name: Is Empty
is empty.description: Checks whether an inventory, an inventory slot, a queue, or a text is empty.

is enchanted.name: Is Enchanted
is enchanted.description: Checks whether an item is enchanted. Enchants must match the exact level by default, unless 'or better' or 'or worse' are used.

is fire resistant.name: Is Fire Resistant
is fire resistant.description: Checks whether an item is fire resistant.

is flammable.name: Is Flammable
is flammable.description: Checks whether an item is flammable.

is flying.name: Is Flying
is flying.description: Checks whether a player is flying.

is frozen.name: Is Frozen
is frozen.description: Checks whether an entity is frozen.

is fuel.name: Is Fuel
is fuel.description: Checks whether an item can be used as fuel in a furnace.

is gliding.name: Is Gliding
is gliding.description: Checks whether a living entity is gliding.

is infinite.name: Is Infinite
is infinite.description: Checks whether potion effects or timespans are infinite.

is interactable.name: Is Interactable
is interactable.description: Checks wether or not a block is interactable.

is invisible.name: Is Invisible
is invisible.description: Checks whether a living entity is invisible.

is invulnerable.name: Is Invulnerable
is invulnerable.description: Checks whether an entity or a gamemode is invulnerable.\nFor gamemodes, Paper and Minecraft 1.20.6 are required

is jumping.name: Is Jumping
is jumping.description: Checks whether a living entity is jumping. This condition does not work on players.

is occluding.name: Is Occluding
is occluding.description: Checks whether an item is a block and completely blocks vision.

is on ground.name: Is on Ground
is on ground.description: Checks whether an entity is on ground.

is operator.name: Is Operator
is operator.description: Checks whether a player is a server operator.

is playing dead.name: Is Playing Dead
is playing dead.description: Checks to see if an axolotl is playing dead.

is riding.name: Is Riding
is riding.description: Tests whether an entity is riding any entity, a specific entity type, or a specific entity.

bell is ringing.name: Bell Is Ringing
bell is ringing.description: Checks to see if a bell is currently ringing. A bell typically rings for 50 game ticks.

is riptiding.name: Is Riptiding
is riptiding.description: Checks to see if an entity is currently using the Riptide enchantment.

is screaming.name: Is Screaming
is screaming.description: Check whether a goat or enderman is screaming.

beehive is sedated.name: Beehive Is Sedated
beehive is sedated.description: Checks if a beehive is sedated from a nearby campfire.

exists/is set.name: Exists/Is Set
exists/is set.description: Checks whether a given expression or variable is set.

is silent.name: Is Silent
is silent.description: Checks whether an entity is silent i.e. its sounds are disabled.

is a skript command.name: Is a Skript command
is a skript command.description: Checks whether a command/string is a custom Skript command.

is sleeping.name: Is Sleeping
is sleeping.description: Checks whether an entity is sleeping.

is sneaking.name: Is Sneaking
is sneaking.description: Checks whether a player is sneaking.

is solid.name: Is Solid
is solid.description: Checks whether an item is solid.

is sprinting.name: Is Sprinting
is sprinting.description: Checks whether a player is sprinting.

is stackable.name: Is Stackable
is stackable.description: Checks whether an item is stackable.

is swimming.name: Is Swimming
is swimming.description: Checks whether a living entity is swimming.

is tameable.name: Is Tameable
is tameable.description: Check if an entity is tameable.

is tamed.name: Is Tamed
is tamed.description: Check if a tameable entity is tamed (horse, parrot, cat, etc.).

is ticking.name: Is Ticking
is ticking.description: Checks if an entity is ticking.

is unbreakable.name: Is Unbreakable
is unbreakable.description: Checks whether an item is unbreakable.

is using experimental feature.name: Is Using Experimental Feature
is using experimental feature.description: Checks whether a script is using an experimental feature by name.

is normalized.name: Is Normalized
is normalized.description: Checks whether a vector is normalized i.e. length of 1

is wearing.name: Is Wearing
is wearing.description: Checks whether an entity is wearing some items (usually armor).

is whitelisted.name: Is Whitelisted
is whitelisted.description: Whether or not the server or a player is whitelisted, or the server is whitelist enforced.

will despawn.name: Will Despawn
will despawn.description: Checks if the dropped item will be despawned naturally through Minecraft's timer.

item has enchantment glint override.name: Item Has Enchantment Glint Override
item has enchantment glint override.description: Checks whether an item has the enchantment glint overridden, or is forced to glint or not.

is holding.name: Is Holding
is holding.description: Checks whether a player is holding a specific item. Cannot be used with endermen, use 'entity is [not] an enderman holding <item type>' instead.

is leashed.name: Is Leashed
is leashed.description: Checks to see if an entity is currently leashed.

leash will drop.name: Leash Will Drop
leash will drop.description: Checks whether the leash item will drop during the leash detaching in an unleash event.

lid is open/closed.name: Lid Is Open/Closed
lid is open/closed.description: Check to see whether lidded blocks (chests, shulkers, etc.) are open or closed.

matches.name: Matches
matches.description: Checks whether the defined strings match the input regexes (Regular expressions).

running minecraft.name: Running Minecraft
running minecraft.description: Checks if current Minecraft version is given version or newer.

panda is on its back.name: Panda Is On Its Back
panda is on its back.description: Whether a panda is on its back.

has permission.name: Has Permission
has permission.description: Test whether a player has a certain permission.

pvp.name: PvP
pvp.description: Set the PvP state for a given world.

resource pack.name: Resource Pack
resource pack.description: Checks state of the resource pack in a resource pack request response event.

is bed/anchor spawn.name: Is Bed/Anchor Spawn
is bed/anchor spawn.description: Checks what the respawn location of a player in the respawn event is.

is script loaded.name: Is Script Loaded
is script loaded.description: Check if the current script, or another script, is currently loaded.

starts/ends with.name: Starts/Ends With
starts/ends with.description: Checks if a text starts or ends with another.

egg will hatch.name: Egg Will Hatch
egg will hatch.description: Whether the egg will hatch in a Player Egg Throw event.

is within radius.name: Is Within Radius
is within radius.description: Checks whether a location is within a certain radius of another location.

delay.name: Delay
delay.description: Delays the script's execution by a given timespan. Please note that delays are not persistent, e.g. trying to create a tempban script with ban player → wait 7 days → unban player will not work if you restart your server anytime within these 7 days. You also have to be careful even when using small delays!

apply bone meal.name: Apply Bone Meal
apply bone meal.description: Applies bone meal to a crop, sapling, or composter

cancel event.name: Cancel Event
cancel event.description: Cancels the event (e.g. prevent blocks from being placed, or damage being taken).

charge entity.name: Charge Entity
charge entity.description: Charges or uncharges a creeper or wither skull. A creeper is charged when it has been struck by lightning.

clear entity storage.name: Clear Entity Storage
clear entity storage.description: Clear the stored entities of an entity block storage (i.e. beehive).

toggle custom name visibility.name: Toggle Custom Name Visibility
toggle custom name visibility.description: Toggles the custom name visibility of an entity.

detonate entities.name: Detonate Entities
detonate entities.description: Immediately detonates an entity. Accepted entities are fireworks, TNT minecarts, primed TNT, wind charges and creepers.

do if.name: Do If
do if.description: Execute an effect if a condition is true.

allow / prevent leash drop.name: Allow / Prevent Leash Drop
allow / prevent leash drop.description: Allows or prevents the leash from being dropped in an unleash event.

force eating.name: Force Eating
force eating.description: Make a panda or horse type (horse, camel, donkey, llama, mule) start/stop eating.

consume boosting firework.name: Consume Boosting Firework
consume boosting firework.description: Prevent the firework used in an 'elytra boost' event to be consumed.

exit.name: Exit
exit.description: Exits a given amount of loops and conditionals, or the entire trigger.

explode creeper.name: Explode Creeper
explode creeper.description: Starts the explosion process of a creeper or instantly explodes it.

launch firework.name: Launch firework
launch firework.description: Launch firework effects at the given location(s).

force enchantment glint.name: Force Enchantment Glint
force enchantment glint.description: Forces the items to glint or not, or removes its existing enchantment glint enforcement.

make sign glow.name: Make Sign Glow
make sign glow.description: Makes a sign (either a block or item) have glowing text or normal text

goat horns.name: Goat Horns
goat horns.description: Make a goat have or not have a left, right, or both horns.

handedness.name: Handedness
handedness.description: Make mobs left or right-handed. This does not affect players.

ignite/extinguish.name: Ignite/Extinguish
ignite/extinguish.description: Lights entities on fire or extinguishes them.

make incendiary.name: Make Incendiary
make incendiary.description: Sets if an entity's explosion will leave behind fire. This effect is also usable in an explosion prime event.

item despawn.name: Item Despawn
item despawn.description: Prevent a dropped item from naturally despawning through Minecraft's timer.

keep inventory / experience.name: Keep Inventory / Experience
keep inventory / experience.description: Keeps the inventory or/and experiences of the dead player in a death event.

knockback.name: Knockback
knockback.description: Apply the same velocity as a knockback to living entities in a direction. Mechanics such as knockback resistance will be factored in.

open/close lid.name: Open/Close Lid
open/close lid.description: Open or close the lid of the block(s).

lightning.name: Lightning
lightning.description: Strike lightning at a given location. Can use 'lightning effect' to create a lightning that does not harm entities or start fires.

look at.name: Look At
look at.description: Forces the mob(s) or player(s) to look at an entity, vector or location. Vanilla max head pitches range from 10 to 50.

make egg hatch.name: Make Egg Hatch
make egg hatch.description: Makes the egg hatch in a Player Egg Throw event.

make fly.name: Make Fly
make fly.description: Forces a player to start/stop flying.

make say.name: Make Say
make say.description: Forces a player to send a message to the chat. If the message starts with a slash it will force the player to use command.

open book.name: Open Book
open book.description: Opens a written book to a player.

force panda on back.name: Force Panda On Back
force panda on back.description: Make a panda get on/off its back.

play dead.name: Play Dead
play dead.description: Make an axolotl start or stop playing dead.

push.name: Push
push.description: Push entities in a given direction or towards a specific location.

force respawn.name: Force Respawn
force respawn.description: Forces player(s) to respawn if they are dead. If this is called without delay from death event, one tick is waited before respawn attempt.

return.name: Return
return.description: Makes a trigger or a section (e.g. a function) return a value

run.name: Run
run.description: Executes a task (a function). Any returned result is discarded.

make entity scream.name: Make Entity Scream
make entity scream.description: Make a goat or enderman start or stop screaming.

send block change.name: Send Block Change
send block change.description: Makes a player see a block as something else or as the original.

silence entity.name: Silence Entity
silence entity.description: Controls whether or not an entity is silent.

stop server.name: Stop Server
stop server.description: Stops or restarts the server. If restart is used when the restart-script spigot.yml option isn't defined, the server will stop instead.

locally suppress warning.name: Locally Suppress Warning
locally suppress warning.description: Suppresses target warnings from the current script.

swing hand.name: Swing Hand
swing hand.description: Makes an entity swing their hand. This does nothing if the entity does not have an animation for swinging their hand.

tame / untame.name: Tame / Untame
tame / untame.description: Tame a tameable entity (horse, parrot, cat, etc.).

toggle.name: Toggle
toggle.description: Toggle the state of a block or boolean.

toggle picking up items.name: Toggle Picking Up Items
toggle picking up items.description: Determines whether living entities are able to pick up items or not

toggle flight.name: Toggle Flight
toggle flight.description: Toggle the flight mode of a player.

absorbed blocks.name: Absorbed blocks
absorbed blocks.description: The blocks absorbed by a sponge block.

affected entities.name: Affected Entities
affected entities.description: The affected entities in the area cloud effect event.

entity ai.name: Entity AI
entity ai.description: Returns whether an entity has AI.

allay target jukebox.name: Allay Target Jukebox
allay target jukebox.description: The location of the jukebox an allay is set to.

all banned players/ips.name: All Banned Players/IPs
all banned players/ips.description: Obtains the list of all banned players or IP addresses.

all commands.name: All commands
all commands.description: Returns all registered commands or all script commands.

alphabetical sort.name: Alphabetical Sort
alphabetical sort.description: Sorts given strings in alphabetical order.

altitude.name: Altitude
altitude.description: Effectively an alias of 'y-coordinate of …', it represents the height of some location within the world.

amount of items.name: Amount of Items
amount of items.description: Counts how many of a particular item type are in a given inventory.

anvil text input.name: Anvil Text Input
anvil text input.description: An expression to get the name to be applied to an item in an anvil inventory.

applied beacon effect.name: Applied Beacon Effect
applied beacon effect.description: The type of effect applied by a beacon.

armor change item.name: Armor Change Item
armor change item.description: Get the unequipped or equipped armor item from a 'armor change' event.

arrows stuck.name: Arrows Stuck
arrows stuck.description: The number of arrows stuck in a living entity.

attacked.name: Attacked
attacked.description: The victim of a damage event, e.g. when a player attacks a zombie this expression represents the zombie.

barter drops.name: Barter Drops
barter drops.description: The items dropped by the piglin in a piglin bartering event.

barter input.name: Barter Input
barter input.description: The item picked up by the piglin in a piglin bartering event.

beehive target flower.name: Beehive Target Flower
beehive target flower.description: The flower a beehive has selected to pollinate from.

block hardness.name: Block Hardness
block hardness.description: Obtains the block's hardness level (also known as \"strength\

block sphere.name: Block Sphere
block sphere.description: All blocks in a sphere around a center, mostly useful for looping.

last caught errors.name: Last Caught Errors
last caught errors.description: Gets the last caught runtime errors from a 'catch runtime errors' section.

character from codepoint.name: Character from Codepoint
character from codepoint.description: Returns the character at the specified codepoint

respawn anchor charges.name: Respawn Anchor Charges
respawn anchor charges.description: The charges of a respawn anchor.

chunk.name: Chunk
chunk.description: Returns the chunk of a block, location or entity is in, or a list of the loaded chunks of a world.

clicked block/entity/inventory/slot.name: Clicked Block/Entity/Inventory/Slot
clicked block/entity/inventory/slot.description: The clicked block, entity, inventory, inventory slot, inventory click type or inventory action.

cooldown time/remaining time/elapsed tim.name: Cooldown Time/Remaining Time/Elapsed Time/Last Usage/Bypass Permission

character codepoint.name: Character Codepoint
character codepoint.description: Returns the Unicode codepoint of a character

consumed item.name: Consumed Item
consumed item.description: Represents the item consumed within an entity shoot bow and item consume event.

coordinate.name: Coordinate
coordinate.description: Represents a given coordinate of a location.

creeper max fuse ticks.name: Creeper Max Fuse Ticks
creeper max fuse ticks.description: The max fuse ticks that a creeper has.

cursor slot.name: Cursor Slot
cursor slot.description: The item which the player has on their inventory cursor. This slot is always empty if player has no inventory open.

damaged item.name: Damaged Item
damaged item.description: Directly damages an item. In MC versions 1.12.2 and lower, this can be used to apply data values to items/blocks

date ago/later.name: Date Ago/Later
date ago/later.description: A date the specified timespan before/after another date.

default value.name: Default Value
default value.description: A shorthand expression for giving things a default value. If the first thing isn't set, the second thing will be returned.

direction.name: Direction
direction.description: A helper expression for the direction type.

drops of block.name: Drops Of Block
drops of block.description: A list of the items that will drop when a block is broken.

damage value/durability.name: Damage Value/Durability
damage value/durability.description: The damage value/durability of an item.

the egg.name: The Egg
the egg.description: The egg thrown in a Player Egg Throw event.

enchantment bonus.name: Enchantment Bonus
enchantment bonus.description: The enchantment bonus in an enchant prepare event. This represents the number of bookshelves affecting/surrounding the enchantment table.

enchantment level.name: Enchantment Level
enchantment level.description: The level of a particular enchantment on an item.

enchantment offer.name: Enchantment Offer
enchantment offer.description: The enchantment offer in enchant prepare events.

item enchantments.name: Item Enchantments
item enchantments.description: All the enchantments an item type has.

ender chest.name: Ender Chest
ender chest.description: The ender chest of a player.

entity owner.name: Entity Owner
entity owner.description: The owner of a tameable entity (i.e. horse or wolf).

entity sound.name: Entity Sound
entity sound.description: Gets the sound that a given entity will make in a specific scenario.

initiator inventory.name: Initiator Inventory
initiator inventory.description: Returns the initiator inventory in an on inventory item move event.

except.name: Except
except.description: Filter a list by providing objects to be excluded.

exhaustion.name: Exhaustion
exhaustion.description: The exhaustion of a player. This is mainly used to determine the rate of hunger depletion.

experience.name: Experience
experience.description: How much experience was spawned in an experience spawn or block break event. Can be changed.

exploded blocks.name: Exploded Blocks
exploded blocks.description: Get all the blocks that were destroyed in an explode event. Supports add/remove/set/clear/delete blocks.

facing.name: Facing
facing.description: The facing of an entity or block, i.e. exactly north, south, east, west, up or down (unlike direction which is the exact direction, e.g. '0.5 south and 0.7 east')

fertilized blocks.name: Fertilized Blocks
fertilized blocks.description: The blocks fertilized in block fertilize events.

final damage.name: Final Damage
final damage.description: How much damage is done in a damage event, considering all types of damage reduction. Can NOT be changed.

entity fire burn duration.name: Entity Fire Burn Duration
entity fire burn duration.description: How much time an entity will be burning for.

firework effect.name: Firework Effect
firework effect.description: Represents a 'firework effect' which can be used in the launch firework effect.

first empty slot in inventory.name: First Empty Slot in Inventory
first empty slot in inventory.description: Returns the first empty slot in an inventory. If no empty slot is found, it returns nothing.

flight mode.name: Flight Mode
flight mode.description: Whether the player(s) are allowed to fly. Use Make Fly effect to force player(s) to fly.

food level.name: Food Level
food level.description: The food level of a player from 0 to 10. Has several aliases: food/hunger level/meter/bar.

freeze time.name: Freeze Time
freeze time.description: How much time an entity has been in powdered snow for.

game mode.name: Game Mode
game mode.description: The gamemode of a player. (Gamemodes)

gamerule value.name: Gamerule Value
gamerule value.description: The gamerule value of a world.

gliding state.name: Gliding State
gliding state.description: Sets of gets gliding state of player. It allows you to set gliding state of entity even if they do not have an Elytra equipped.

glowing.name: Glowing
glowing.description: Indicates if targeted entity is glowing (new 1.9 effect) or not. Glowing entities can be seen through walls.

gravity.name: Gravity
gravity.description: If entity is affected by gravity or not, i.e. if it has Minecraft 1.10+ NoGravity flag.

hanging entity/remover.name: Hanging Entity/Remover
hanging entity/remover.description: Returns the hanging entity or remover in hanging break and place events.

hatching entity type.name: Hatching Entity Type
hatching entity type.description: The type of the entity that will be hatched in a Player Egg Throw event.

heal amount.name: Heal Amount
heal amount.description: The amount of health healed in a heal event.

heal reason.name: Heal Reason
heal reason.description: The heal reason of a heal event.

health.name: Health
health.description: The health of a creature, e.g. a player, mob, villager, etc. The minimum value is 0, and the maximum is the creature's max health (e.g. 10 for players).

hostname.name: Hostname
hostname.description: The hostname used by the connecting player to connect to the server in a connect event.

hotbar button.name: Hotbar Button
hotbar button.description: The hotbar button clicked in an inventory click event.

inventory.name: Inventory
inventory.description: The inventory of a block or player. You can usually omit this expression and can directly add or remove items to/from blocks or players.

inventory action.name: Inventory Action
inventory action.description: The inventory action of an inventory event. Please click on the link for more information.

inventory close reason.name: Inventory Close Reason
inventory close reason.description: The inventory close reason of an inventory close event.

inverse boolean.name: Inverse Boolean
inverse boolean.description: An expression to obtain the inverse value of a boolean

item.name: Item
item.description: The item involved in an event, e.g. in a drop, dispense, pickup or craft event.

item amount.name: Item Amount
item amount.description: The amount of an item stack.

item flags.name: Item Flags
item flags.description: The item flags of an item. Can be modified.

items.name: Items
items.description: Items or blocks of a specific type, useful for looping.

dropped item thrower.name: Dropped Item Thrower
dropped item thrower.description: The uuid of the entity or player that threw/dropped the dropped item.

item with custom model data.name: Item with Custom Model Data
item with custom model data.description: Get an item with custom model data.

item with enchantment glint.name: Item with Enchantment Glint
item with enchantment glint.description: Get an item with or without enchantment glint.

join & split.name: Join & Split
join & split.description: Joins several texts with a common delimiter (e.g. \", \

last attacker.name: Last Attacker
last attacker.description: The last block or entity that attacked an entity.

last damage.name: Last Damage
last damage.description: The last damage that was done to an entity. Note that changing it doesn't deal more/less damage.

last damage cause.name: Last Damage Cause
last damage cause.description: Cause of last damage done to an entity

last/first login time.name: Last/First Login Time
last/first login time.description: When a player last/first logged in the server. 'last login' requires paper to get the last login, otherwise it will get the last time they were seen on the server.

last resource pack response.name: Last Resource Pack Response
last resource pack response.description: Returns the last resource pack response received from a player.

leash holder.name: Leash Holder
leash holder.description: The leash holder of a living entity.

length.name: Length
length.description: The length of a text, in number of characters.

level.name: Level
level.description: The experience level of a player.

location at.name: Location At
location at.description: Allows to create a location from three coordinates and a world.

vectors - create location from vector.name: Vectors - Create Location from Vector
vectors - create location from vector.description: Creates a location from a vector in a world.

loop iteration.name: Loop Iteration
loop iteration.description: Returns the loop's current iteration count (for both normal and while loops).

loop value.name: Loop value
loop value.description: Returns the previous, current, or next looped value.

maximum freeze time.name: Maximum Freeze Time
maximum freeze time.description: The maximum amount of time an entity can spend in powdered snow before taking damage.

max health.name: Max Health
max health.description: The maximum health of an entity, e.g. 10 for a player.

max minecart speed.name: Max Minecart Speed
max minecart speed.description: The maximum speed of a minecart.

me.name: Me
me.description: A 'me' expression that can be used in players' effect commands only.

free / max / total memory.name: Free / Max / Total Memory
free / max / total memory.description: The free, max or total memory of the server in Megabytes.

metadata.name: Metadata
metadata.description: Metadata is a way to store temporary data on entities, blocks and more that disappears after a server restart.

middle of location.name: Middle of Location
middle of location.description: Returns the middle/center of a location. In other words, returns the middle of the X, Z coordinates and the floor value of the Y coordinate of a location.

midpoint.name: Midpoint
midpoint.description: Get the midpoint between two vectors or two locations in the same world.

minecart derailed / flying velocity.name: Minecart Derailed / Flying Velocity
minecart derailed / flying velocity.description: The velocity of a minecart as soon as it has been derailed or as soon as it starts flying.

moon phase.name: Moon Phase
moon phase.description: The current moon phase of a world.

name / display name / tab list name.name: Name / Display Name / Tab List Name

nearest entity.name: Nearest Entity
nearest entity.description: Gets the entity nearest to a location or another entity.

no damage ticks.name: No Damage Ticks
no damage ticks.description: The number of ticks that an entity is invulnerable to damage for.

no damage time.name: No Damage Time
no damage time.description: The amount of time an entity is invulnerable to any damage.

now.name: Now
now.description: The current system time of the server. Use time to get the Minecraft time of a world.

number of characters.name: Number of Characters
number of characters.description: The number of uppercase, lowercase, or digit characters in a string.

offline players.name: Offline players
offline players.description: All players that have ever joined the server. This includes the players currently online.

all operators.name: All Operators
all operators.description: The list of operators on the server.

panda gene.name: Panda Gene
panda gene.description: The main or hidden gene of a panda.

parse error.name: Parse Error
parse error.description: The error which caused the last parse operation to fail, which might not be set if a pattern was used and the pattern didn't match the provided text at all.

percent of.name: Percent of
percent of.description: Returns a percentage of one or more numbers.

all permissions.name: All Permissions
all permissions.description: Returns all permissions of the defined player(s). Note that the modifications to resulting list do not actually change permissions.

pickup delay.name: Pickup Delay
pickup delay.description: The amount of time before a dropped item can be picked up by an entity.

plain item.name: Plain Item
plain item.description: A plain item is an item with no modifications. It can be used to convert items to their default state or to match with other default items.

player protocol version.name: Player Protocol Version
player protocol version.description: Player's protocol version. For more information and list of protocol versions visit wiki.vg.

loaded plugins.name: Loaded Plugins
loaded plugins.description: An expression to obtain a list of the names of the server's loaded plugins.

portal.name: Portal
portal.description: The blocks associated with a portal in the portal creation event.

projectile critical state.name: Projectile Critical State
projectile critical state.description: A projectile's critical state. The only currently accepted projectiles are arrows and tridents.

projectile force.name: Projectile Force
projectile force.description: Returns the force at which a projectile was shot within an entity shoot bow event.

moved blocks.name: Moved blocks
moved blocks.description: Blocks which are moved in a piston event. Cannot be used outside of piston events.

quit reason.name: Quit Reason
quit reason.description: The quit reason as to why a player disconnected in a quit event.

random.name: Random
random.description: Gets a random item out of a set, e.g. a random player out of all players online.

raw name.name: Raw Name
raw name.description: The raw Minecraft material name of the given item. Note that this is not guaranteed to give same results on all servers.

readied arrow/bow.name: Readied Arrow/Bow
readied arrow/bow.description: The bow or arrow in a Ready Arrow event.

recursive.name: Recursive
recursive.description: Returns all values of an expression, including those in nested structures such as lists of lists.

remaining air.name: Remaining Air
remaining air.description: How much time a player has left underwater before starting to drown.

repeat string.name: Repeat String
repeat string.description: Repeats inputted strings a given amount of times.

respawn location.name: Respawn location
respawn location.description: The location that a player should respawn at. This is used within the respawn event.

respawn reason.name: Respawn Reason
respawn reason.description: The respawn reason in a respawn event.

rounding.name: Rounding
rounding.description: Rounds numbers normally, up (ceiling) or down (floor) respectively.

saturation.name: Saturation
saturation.description: The saturation of a player. If used in a player event, it can be omitted and will default to event-player.

all scripts.name: All Scripts
all scripts.description: Returns all of the scripts, or just the enabled or disabled ones.

sea level.name: Sea Level
sea level.description: Gets the sea level of a world.

sea pickles.name: Sea Pickles
sea pickles.description: An expression to obtain or modify data relating to the pickles of a sea pickle block.

world seed.name: World Seed
world seed.description: The seed of given world. Note that it will be returned as Minecraft internally treats seeds, not as you specified it in world configuration.

sets.name: Sets
sets.description: Returns a list of all the values of a type. Useful for looping.

player skull.name: Player Skull
player skull.description: Gets a skull item representing a player. Skulls for other entities are provided by the aliases.

skull owner.name: Skull Owner
skull owner.description: The skull owner of a player skull.

sorted list.name: Sorted List
sorted list.description: Sorts given list in natural order. All objects in list must be comparable; if they're not, this expression will return nothing.

source block.name: Source Block
source block.description: The source block in a spread event.

spawn reason.name: Spawn Reason
spawn reason.description: The spawn reason in a spawn event.

spectator target.name: Spectator Target
spectator target.description: Grabs the spectator target entity of the players.

case text.name: Case Text
case text.description: Copy of given text in Lowercase, Uppercase, Proper Case, camelCase, PascalCase, Snake_Case, and Kebab-Case

tamer.name: Tamer
tamer.description: The tamer of an entity. Can only be used in entity tame events. You can use 'event-entity' to refer tamed entity itself.

teleport cause.name: Teleport Cause
teleport cause.description: The teleport cause within a player teleport event.

ternary.name: Ternary
ternary.description: A shorthand expression for returning something based on a condition.

timespan details.name: Timespan Details
timespan details.description: Retrieve specific information of a timespan such as hours/minutes/etc.

tool.name: Tool
tool.description: The item an entity is holding in their main or off hand.

transform reason.name: Transform Reason
transform reason.description: The transform reason within an entity entity transform event.

unbreakable items.name: Unbreakable Items
unbreakable items.description: Creates breakable or unbreakable copies of given items.

unix date.name: Unix Date
unix date.description: Converts given Unix timestamp to a date. The Unix timespan represents the number of seconds elapsed since 1 January 1970.

unix timestamp.name: Unix Timestamp
unix timestamp.description: Converts given date to Unix timestamp. This is roughly how many seconds have elapsed since 1 January 1970.

unleash reason.name: Unleash Reason
unleash reason.description: The unleash reason in an unleash event.

uuid.name: UUID
uuid.description: The UUID of a player, entity or world.

vectors - angle between.name: Vectors - Angle Between
vectors - angle between.description: Gets the angle between two vectors.

vectors - vector between locations.name: Vectors - Vector Between Locations
vectors - vector between locations.description: Creates a vector between two locations.

vectors - cross product.name: Vectors - Cross Product
vectors - cross product.description: Gets the cross product between two vectors.

vectors - cylindrical shape.name: Vectors - Cylindrical Shape
vectors - cylindrical shape.description: Forms a 'cylindrical shaped' vector using yaw to manipulate the current point.

vectors - dot product.name: Vectors - Dot Product
vectors - dot product.description: Gets the dot product between two vectors.

vectors - create from xyz.name: Vectors - Create from XYZ
vectors - create from xyz.description: Creates a vector from x, y and z values.

vectors - vector from yaw and pitch.name: Vectors - Vector from Yaw and Pitch
vectors - vector from yaw and pitch.description: Creates a vector from a yaw and pitch value.

vectors - length.name: Vectors - Length
vectors - length.description: Gets or sets the length of a vector.

vectors - normalized.name: Vectors - Normalized
vectors - normalized.description: Returns the same vector but with length 1.

vectors - vector from location.name: Vectors - Vector from Location
vectors - vector from location.description: Creates a vector from a location.

vectors - vector projection.name: Vectors - Vector Projection
vectors - vector projection.description: An expression to get the vector projection of two vectors.

vectors - spherical shape.name: Vectors - Spherical Shape
vectors - spherical shape.description: Forms a 'spherical shaped' vector using yaw and pitch to manipulate the current point.

vectors - squared length.name: Vectors - Squared Length
vectors - squared length.description: Gets the squared length of a vector.

version.name: Version
version.description: The version of Bukkit, Minecraft or Skript respectively.

villager profession.name: Villager Profession
villager profession.description: Represents the profession of a villager/zombie villager.

villager type.name: Villager Type
villager type.description: Represents the type of a villager/zombie villager. This usually represents the biome the villager is from.

whether.name: Whether
whether.description: A shorthand for returning the result of a condition (true or false). This is functionally identical to using `true if <condition> else false`.

item with item flags.name: Item with Item Flags
item with item flags.description: Creates a new item with the specified item flags.

world.name: World
world.description: The world the event occurred in.

center of world border.name: Center of World Border
center of world border.description: The center of a world border.

warning time of world border.name: Warning Time of World Border
warning time of world border.description: The warning time of a world border. If the border is shrinking, the player's screen will be tinted red once the border will catch the player within this time period.

world from name.name: World from Name
world from name.description: Returns the world from a string.

worlds.name: Worlds
worlds.description: All worlds of the server, useful for looping.

x of item/entity type.name: X of Item/Entity Type
x of item/entity type.description: An expression for using an item or entity type with a different amount.

arithmetic.name: Arithmetic
arithmetic.description: Arithmetic expressions, e.g. 1 + 2, (health of player - 2) / 3, etc.

prefix/suffix.name: Prefix/Suffix
prefix/suffix.description: The prefix or suffix as defined in the server's chat plugin.

money.name: Money
money.description: How much virtual money a player has (can be changed).

all groups.name: All Groups
all groups.description: All the groups a player can have. This expression requires Vault and a compatible permissions plugin to be installed.

console.name: Console
console.description: Represents the server's console which can receive messages and execute commands

maximum double value.name: Maximum Double Value
maximum double value.description: A number representing the maximum value of a double number type.

minimum double value.name: Minimum Double Value
minimum double value.description: A number representing the minimum value of a double number type.

maximum float value.name: Maximum Float Value
maximum float value.description: A number representing the maximum value of a float number type.

minimum float value.name: Minimum Float Value
minimum float value.description: A number representing the minimum value of a float number type.

maximum integer value.name: Maximum Integer Value
maximum integer value.description: A number representing the maximum value of an integer number type.

minimum integer value.name: Minimum Integer Value
minimum integer value.description: A number representing the minimum value of an integer number type.

maximum long value.name: Maximum Long Value
maximum long value.description: A number representing the maximum value of a long number type.

minimum long value.name: Minimum Long Value
minimum long value.description: A number representing the minimum value of a long number type.

shoot.name: Shoot
shoot.description: Shoots a projectile (or any other entity) from a given entity or location.

catch runtime errors.name: Catch Runtime Errors
catch runtime errors.description: Catch any runtime errors produced by code within the section. This is an in progress feature.

while loop.name: While Loop
while loop.description: While Loop sections are loops that will just keep repeating as long as a condition is met.

aliases.name: Aliases
aliases.description: Used for registering custom aliases for a script.

assert.name: Assert
assert.description: Assert that condition is true. Test fails when it is not.

objectives.name: Objectives
objectives.description: An effect to setup required objectives for JUnit tests to complete.

test plural class infos.name: Test Plural Class Infos
test plural class infos.description: Tests that plural class infos are identified correctly.

experimental only.name: Experimental Only
experimental only.description: A do-nothing syntax that only parses when `example feature` is enabled.

parse logs.name: Parse Logs
parse logs.description: Returns the last known parse logs from a parse section, if any.

test block.name: Test Block
test block.description: The block the testing is taking place at.

test location.name: Test Location
test location.description: The location the testing is taking place at.

test string literal.name: Test String Literal
test string literal.description: Accepts only a string literal. Used for testing correct parsing & literal treatment. Returns the value.

test world.name: Test World
test world.description: The world the testing is taking place in.

parse section.name: Parse Section
parse section.description: Parse code inside this section and use 'parse logs' to grab any logs from it.

parse structure.name: Parse Structure
parse structure.description: Parses the code inside this structure as a structure and use 'parse logs' to grab any logs from it.
